calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Plaintiff To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Mar-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CAPITAL ONE's Motion to Transfer Venue is granted. No opposition and good cause shown. Plaintiff is required to pay all the transfer fees. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
